signals.headline: Victor Wembanyama in Concussion Protocol, Ruled Out Game 2 vs
signals.raw:
Victor Wembanyama in Concussion Protocol, Ruled Out Game 2 vs. Trail Blazers | NO (Spurs advance odds drop) | HIGH confidence** [4]  
Spurs rookie and MVP finalist Wembanyama exited Game 2 after a hard fall post-Game 1 win, entering protocol and ruled out, hurting their series outlook despite early playoff tone-setting.[3][4] Affects potential Western matchup seeding.
